---
title: "Bibliography"
subtitle: "One IT Research Working Group — Reference List"
author: "Compiled by Tim Dennis, UCLA Library Data Science Center"
date: "March 2026"
bibliography: bibliography.ris
nocite: '@*'
csl: apa.csl
---

The formatted reference list appears below. The source RIS file is available for import into Zotero or other reference managers via the [Resources](resources.qmd) page.

## References

::: {#refs}
:::
